action: Convert M-009's inherited-unresolved continuity handoff into an executable fail-closed lineage invariant.

selected_from.selection_reason: M-009 explicitly identifies silent loss of inherited unresolved work as the next continuity risk.

resolved_claims: deterministic detection of a predecessor unresolved claim disappearing without explicit inheritance or resolution

progress.memory: A successor continuity record must explicitly carry each predecessor unresolved claim in unresolved_inherited or name it in resolved_claims; omission is a lineage violation.
progress.verification: Five deterministic Node checks passed in an isolated runtime: preservation, explicit resolution across a full lineage, dropped-claim detection, fail-closed assertion, and missing-dependency detection.

claim_states.observed: M-009's handoff requested inherited-unresolved tracking and a deterministic disappearance test; the new validator and test are committed.
claim_states.inferred: Explicit lineage fields can prevent successor records from silently erasing open work.
claim_states.proposed: Add a repository loader and CI gate over actual M-* queue-update records.
claim_states.superseded: Prose-only preservation of unresolved continuity handoffs.
unresolved: normalization adapter for older queue-update schemas
automatic discovery of undeclared lineage dependencies

privacy_boundary: Public repository metadata and abstract decision structure only. Raw private chat, health and pet-health material, credentials, personal identifiers, and unreviewed uploads were excluded.
handoff: Build a normalization loader for historical M-* records and wire validateInheritedUnresolved into a deterministic repository gate.
